aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and service pages, but lacks depth in content and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve engagement.
Expand content on service pages with relevant keywords and detailed information.
Implement a blog section to target long-tail keywords and establish authority.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a clear focus on HVAC services in Arizona, with specific location targeting.
gbp_analysis.summary: The website effectively targets its primary service area but lacks detailed location-specific content and geo-targeted keywords.
critical_issues: No dedicated location pages for cities like Gilbert, Mesa, and Tempe.
Lack of geo-targeted keywords in meta tags and content.

nap_citations.summary: The business has no visible online reviews or citations, which are crucial for local search visibility.
action_items: Create and verify a Google My Business profile.
Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews on Google and other platforms.
Ensure consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
Missing Product schema for the HVAC systems listed on the website.
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed business information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of user-generated content and engagement features.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services and detailed product information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review system and adding FAQ sections.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as an industry leader.

page_title: Arizona Air Conditioning And Heating Service
